  "findings": [
    "Missing pipe guides near expansion loops",
    "Non-compliant with MSS SP-58 support and guide requirements",
    "Potential for excessive pipe movement and stress at expansion loops"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install required pipe guides per project support standards and MSS SP-58",
    "Inspect adjacent supports and anchors for damage from unrestrained movement",
    "Verify expansion loop geometry and cold-spring settings after guide installation"
  ],
  "rationale": "Expansion loops require guides to direct thermal movement into the loop and prevent buckling or overstress. Missing guides allow uncontrolled lateral movement, risking pipe fatigue, support overload, or loop failure. This is a non-compliant, degraded condition that compromises system integrity under operating loads.",
  "references": [
    "MSS SP-58 (Pipe Hangers and Supports – Materials, Design, Manufacture, Selection, Application, and Installation)",
    "Project support standards"
  ]
}
